notes: Frasier's dispatchable roster. Two classes: demons (loud, fast, burnable, corruptible) and humans (slow, quiet, indebted). Per _COMMUNITY_PLANNED_SPEC.md §Agents. Each agent has a home region (for travel-speed modifiers), a specialty (the problem-types they handle well), a signature failure mode, and an economy state (burn / corruption / obligation) that ticks with use.

demons.name: Vagrant
demons.signature_failure: Gets arrested or 'found' by a local press hook.
demons.flavor: Long-distance reconnaissance. Walks into a town quiet and walks out quieter. The reports come back clipped to the back of a postcard.

demons.name: Cicada
demons.signature_failure: Surfaces too loudly. Blows cover for adjacent operations.

failure_effects.text: Cicada surfaced in Phase Three. Two adjacent operations are now legible.

demons.flavor: Long-watch surveillance. Has been embedded in Harmony Creek for nine years; the residents next to her think she is the residents next to them.

demons.name: Moth
demons.signature_failure: Starts a fire that has consequences in the wrong region.

failure_effects.text: Moth set a fire in the place it was sent to but the smoke registered three counties over.

demons.flavor: Light demolitions, distraction. Goes in fluttering, leaves a small flame the room had been wanting.

demons.name: Steamboat
demons.signature_failure: Leaves a wake. Adjacent regions develop a noticeable problem on the same day.

failure_effects.text: Steamboat's wake is in the canal at Harmony Creek and in the bayou at Graustark by morning.

demons.flavor: Heavy infrastructure. Was already old when the riverboat was new. Cannot, by physics, be sent to Small Wood — there's no water big enough for him.

demons.name: Weir
demons.signature_failure: Takes a piece of the river with it when it goes. Graustark loses one held node temporarily.

failure_effects.text: The Weir took a length of the riverfront with it. The riverfront node is dark for the next week.

demons.flavor: Water work, river-bound. Only operates in Graustark.

demons.name: Filly
demons.signature_failure: Gets intercepted. What was being carried is now also in the enemy's hand.

failure_effects.text: Filly was intercepted at the state line. The letter is now also in someone else's hand.

demons.flavor: Fast courier. The only demon Frasier sends without a cover identity; she carries her own.

demons.name: Starling
demons.signature_failure: Scatters. Future starling work in the region costs double agent-days.

failure_effects.text: Starlings scattered above the cul-de-sac. The neighborhood watch is now alert.

demons.flavor: Flock surveillance. Embedded in places like Harmony Creek where seven shapes overhead don't look like seven shapes.

demons.name: Husk
demons.signature_failure: Catastrophic. The job gets done. A body or equivalent is left.

failure_effects.text: Husk did the work. There is a body in the road or its equivalent. Husk does not come back this summer.

demons.flavor: Last-resort blunt instrument. Frasier has used him twice in twenty years.

humans.name: Mackenzie at the Loom
humans.flavor: Has relocated to a phase-three lot in Harmony Creek to be near the loom-co-op. Philip is in Lacombe. The loom does not run unattended.

humans.name: The Surviving D'Ambrosio Son
humans.flavor: The storefront in the parish (the family's post-Sinkhole operation). Sammy holds the bar. Hector holds the line. The son holds the floor — when he's home.

life_cost_thresholds.3: starts posting about closing the restaurant
life_cost_thresholds.4: starts asking Frasier to stop sending

humans.name: John Frank
humans.flavor: The diner. The counter. Faith died in '13; the dog he has now is named after her sister, but he calls it Faith anyway when he isn't paying attention. Will go anywhere in Graustark on a half-day's notice; cross-region takes more.

life_cost_thresholds.4: the diner's grill goes cold a day in a way the regulars notice

humans.name: Elicia Duchane
humans.flavor: The bungalow archive. The Whispers from the Liminal cult audience now in its fifteenth year. Cuts a documentary on whatever she's sent into. The cuts go to the BBS.

life_cost_thresholds.3: the choose-your-own-adventure episode falls further behind
life_cost_thresholds.4: stops cutting and the BBS goes quiet

humans.name: Nicola
humans.flavor: Aria is fourteen now. Nicola runs the house. Stays in Graustark unless the problem is grief-shaped and large.

life_cost_thresholds.2: Aria starts posting about the house being empty

humans.name: Jules (Small Wood contact)
humans.flavor: Frasier's longest-running Small Wood contact. Eight years. Manager at the timber yard; sublets the room above the office to Frasier's network. Trusts Frasier. Doesn't, on balance, like him.

life_cost_thresholds.2: starts hinting about the room being for rent

evolution_traits_catalog.cold_terrain_resistance: Halves corruption accrual in Small Wood for this demon. Earned after 3 returns from Small Wood without turning.
evolution_traits_catalog.press_invisibility: Vagrant's failure mode no longer triggers press_exposure increments. Earned after 5 successful dispatches without failure.
evolution_traits_catalog.policy_intuition: Cicada handles hoa_action and newsletter_item at +0.3 competence. Earned after 8 successful Harmony Creek dispatches.
evolution_traits_catalog.embedded_permanence: Cicada can be left on-station between dispatches without accruing burn. Earned at complexity 5.
evolution_traits_catalog.controlled_burn: Moth's failure mode no longer spawns problems in neighbors. Earned after 4 successful moth dispatches in any region.
evolution_traits_catalog.wake_management: Steamboat's failure mode only affects one neighbor instead of all. Earned at complexity 6.
evolution_traits_catalog.bayou_native: Weir's recovery time after burn halved. Earned after 3 successful river-work dispatches.
evolution_traits_catalog.dead_drop_specialist: Filly can split a courier load between two destinations on one dispatch. Earned at complexity 3.
evolution_traits_catalog.coordinated_flock: Starlings can stack on a single problem for +0.4 competence each. Earned after 4 successful Harmony Creek dispatches.
evolution_traits_catalog.controlled_husk: Husk's catastrophic failure no longer locks for the saga. Earned by a high-complexity Husk surviving a Small Wood return.
evolution_traits_catalog.community_organizer: Mackenzie's competence at community_meeting +0.2 permanently. Earned at obligation 3 without stopping pickup.
evolution_traits_catalog.press_voice: Elicia's documentaries surface as BBS unlocks on the writers' board. Earned at complexity 3.
evolution_traits_catalog.restaurant_anchor: Surviving son's home node generates 50% more insight. Earned after holding obligation under 3 for 30 days.
evolution_traits_catalog.small_wood_native: Jules's specialty types gain +0.3 competence. Earned at complexity 2.
